The bundled title fonts are licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.
Full license: https://openfontlicense.org  (OFL-1.1)

Fonts and their copyright holders:
- Playfair Display   — Copyright the Playfair Project Authors
- Cormorant Garamond — Copyright the Cormorant Project Authors (Christian Thalmann / Catharsis Fonts)
- EB Garamond        — Copyright Georg Duffner and Octavio Pardo
- Cinzel             — Copyright Natanael Gama (Ndiscovered)
- Libre Baskerville  — Copyright Impallari Type
- Lora               — Copyright Cyreal
- Great Vibes        — Copyright TypeSETit, LLC
- Tangerine          — Copyright Toshi Omagari

The OFL permits bundling and redistribution of these font files with this
application. Rendering text to video (rasterised glyphs) is unrestricted.
